name: mindtrain
description: Turn private local references into user-approved training domains and run conversational training with MindTrain.

interface.shortDescription: Build private training domains from your own references
interface.longDescription: Configure a private MindTrain instance, index local references without uploading their content, let Codex organize training domains and knowledge points for your approval, then save them and begin conversational training and review.
defaultPrompt: Use $mindtrain to configure my private MindTrain instance.
Use $mindtrain to organize a training domain from my local reference directory, preview it, and save it after I confirm.
Use $mindtrain to start today's training session.
Use $mindtrain to review my learning backlog.
